mapper.sql: ac.id, ac.user_id, ac.username, ac.phone, ac.seat_info, ac.message, ac.status, ac.create_time, ac.handle_time, ac.handle_admin_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_call (user_id, username, phone, seat_info, message, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{phone}, #{seatInfo}, #{message}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT , u.username as handle_admin_name FROM admin_call ac LEFT JOIN user u ON ac.handle_admin_id = u.id ORDER BY ac.create_time DESC
SELECT , u.username as handle_admin_name FROM admin_call ac LEFT JOIN user u ON ac.handle_admin_id = u.id WHERE ac.status = #{status} ORDER BY ac.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_call
(username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(user_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT FROM admin_call ac WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ac.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_call WHERE status = 0
